Summary

Short Description: INC10448623 | bbr02.tl01.nyc01 | BGP_IO_ERROR_CLOSE_SESSION
Outage Start: 
Outage End: 
Severity: 4
Source of detection: monitoring
Impact / Actions

Description of event: Routing protocol failure on the device due to device failure or related connectivity issue
Potential customer impact: Loss of reundant network path. For some cases there's an interruption if no redundancy is available

Actions taken: 
Actions pending/ongoing: 
Root Cause
